titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 87: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 87. (A.R. No. 42 of 1897.) KARUNTAṬṬĀṄKUḌI, TANJAVUR TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall, central shrine, Vasishṭēśvara temple.
The first two lines are published in S.I.I., Vol. V No. 1405.

Records that Madhurāntakan Gaṇḍarādittaṉ donated ninety-six sheep for burning a perpetual lamp to Mahādēva of Karuntiṭṭaikuḍi, a suburb on the outskirts of Tañjāvūr in Tañjāvūr-kūṟṟam. The shepherd Amaraṉ Kuṟumbaṉ received the sheep and agreed to supply uḷakku of ghee by the measure Rājakēsari for that purpose. However as he could not fulfil his obligation, in the eleventh year ie next year (982 A.D.) Amaraṉ Karuvūraṉ received forty-eight sheep from Amaraṉ Kuṟumbaṉ and agreed to supply an āḻākku of ghee daily by the measure, Rājakēsari.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakecaripaṉmaṟkku yāṇṭu pattāvatu tañcāvūrk kūṟṟattu tañcāvūr puṟampaṭik karuntiṭ
ṭaikuṭi ma(ā)hādevarkku maturān=takaṉ kaṇṭarātittaṉ vaitta Āṭu toṇṇūṟṟāṟum koṇṭu neyyaṭṭak kaṭava maṉṟāṭi
The following five lines of this inscriptions were copied in 2001-02.

Amaraṉ kuṟumpaṉ IrāyeriyālRead irājakecariyālnon=tā viḷakkoṉṟukku Aṭṭak kaṭava ney
Uḻakku Ivai cāvāmuvāp perāṭu Ivai paṉmāheśvarar rakkṣai .... yāṇṭu 10Āvatu Ivviḷakku
maturāntakaṉ kaṇṭarātittaṉ Iṭai Āṭu toṇṇūṟṟu Āṟu koṇṭu Irācakecariyāl nicatam Uḻakku ney Aṭṭa kaṭava Emai
yaṉ Amaraṉ kuṟumpaṉ Aṭṭi vārā niṟka Ivvāṇṭu Ivaniṭaiye nāṟpatteṭṭu Āṭuṅkoṇṭu niśatam Irājakeśariyāl Āḻākku ney Aṭṭuvaṉāneṉ
Amaraṉ karuvūraneṉ Ivai cāvāmuvāpperāṭu Ivai panmāheśvararakṣaiThe entire text is given in Āvaṇam issue No. I. P. 52..
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 87 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
